---
title: "Digital Infrastructure"
subtitle: "Open-Source, UNIX & Apple infrastructure for businesses of all sizes"
description: "Production-grade open-source, Linux, BSD, and Apple Business infrastructure for SMBs. NixOS, OpenBSD, FreeBSD, Nextcloud, and zero-touch Apple device deployment."
from: markdown+raw_html
page-layout: full
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <style>
        /* Apple Business-inspired clean design */
        .apple-section { padding: 5rem 0; }
        .apple-section-alt { padding: 5rem 0; background-color: #f5f5f7; }
        [data-bs-theme="dark"] .apple-section-alt { background-color: #1d1d1f; }
        .apple-hero { padding: 6rem 0 4rem; text-align: center; }
        .apple-hero h1 { font-size: 3.5rem; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: -0.02em; margin-bottom: 1rem; }
        .apple-hero p { font-size: 1.35rem; color: #86868b; max-width: 700px; margin: 0 auto; }
        .apple-grid-item { text-align: center; padding: 2rem 1.5rem; }
        .apple-grid-item i { font-size: 2.5rem; color: var(--brand-green, #81BD4A); margin-bottom: 1rem; display: block; }
        .apple-grid-item h3 { font-size: 1.25rem; font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 0.5rem; }
        .apple-grid-item p { font-size: 0.95rem; color: #86868b; }
        .apple-feature-row { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 4rem; padding: 3rem 0; }
        .apple-feature-row.reverse { flex-direction: row-reverse; }
        .apple-feature-text h2 { font-size: 2.5rem; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: -0.02em; margin-bottom: 1rem; }
        .apple-feature-text p { font-size: 1.1rem; color: #86868b; line-height: 1.6; }
        .apple-feature-text ul { font-size: 1.05rem; color: #86868b; line-height: 2; list-style: none; padding: 0; }
        .apple-feature-text ul li::before { content: "\2713  "; color: var(--brand-green, #81BD4A); font-weight: 700; }
        .apple-feature-img { flex: 0 0 45%; }
        .apple-feature-img img { width: 100%; border-radius: 12px; }
        .apple-link { color: var(--brand-green, #81BD4A); font-weight: 500; text-decoration: none; }
        .apple-link:hover { text-decoration: underline; }
        .apple-link::after { content: " \2192"; }
        .apple-cta { text-align: center; padding: 5rem 0; }
        .apple-cta h2 { font-size: 2.5rem; font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 1rem; }
        .apple-cta p { font-size: 1.1rem; color: #86868b; margin-bottom: 2rem; }
        .apple-btn { background-color: var(--brand-green, #81BD4A); color: white; padding: 0.75rem 2rem; border-radius: 50px; font-weight: 600; text-decoration: none; display: inline-block; transition: opacity 0.2s; }
        .apple-btn:hover { opacity: 0.85; color: white; text-decoration: none; }
        .apple-btn-outline { border: 2px solid var(--brand-green, #81BD4A); color: var(--brand-green, #81BD4A); padding: 0.75rem 2rem; border-radius: 50px; font-weight: 600; text-decoration: none; display: inline-block; transition: all 0.2s; }
        .apple-btn-outline:hover { background-color: var(--brand-green, #81BD4A); color: white; text-decoration: none; }
        .apple-package-card { border: 2px solid #e0e0e0; border-radius: 16px; padding: 2.5rem 2rem; text-align: center; transition: all 0.3s ease; height: 100%; display: flex; flex-direction: column; }
        .apple-package-card:hover { border-color: var(--brand-green, #81BD4A); transform: translateY(-4px); box-shadow: 0 8px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.08); }
        .apple-package-card.featured { border-color: var(--brand-green, #81BD4A); }
        .apple-package-card h3 { font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 0.25rem; }
        .apple-package-card .subtitle { font-size: 0.9rem; color: #86868b; margin-bottom: 1.5rem; }
        .apple-package-card .tagline { font-size: 1rem; color: #86868b; margin-bottom: 1.5rem; }
        .apple-package-card ul { text-align: left; list-style: none; padding: 0; margin-bottom: 2rem; flex-grow: 1; }
        .apple-package-card ul li { padding: 0.35rem 0; font-size: 0.95rem; color: #555; }
        .apple-package-card ul li::before { content: "\2713  "; color: var(--brand-green, #81BD4A); font-weight: 700; }
        [data-bs-theme="dark"] .apple-package-card { border-color: #333; }
        [data-bs-theme="dark"] .apple-package-card.featured { border-color: var(--brand-green, #81BD4A); }
        [data-bs-theme="dark"] .apple-package-card ul li { color: #aaa; }
        .apple-callout { background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(108,117,125,0.08) 0%, rgba(129,189,74,0.08) 100%); border-radius: 12px; padding: 1.5rem 2rem; margin-top: 1.5rem; }
        .apple-callout h4 { font-size: 1.1rem; font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 0.5rem; }
        .apple-callout p { font-size: 0.95rem; color: #86868b; margin-bottom: 0; }
        .apple-section-header { text-align: center; margin-bottom: 3rem; }
        .apple-section-header h2 { font-size: 2.5rem; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: -0.02em; margin-bottom: 0.5rem; }
        .apple-section-header p { font-size: 1.1rem; color: #86868b; }
        @media (max-width: 768px) {
          .apple-hero h1 { font-size: 2.25rem; }
          .apple-feature-row, .apple-feature-row.reverse { flex-direction: column; gap: 2rem; }
          .apple-feature-img { flex: none; }
          .apple-feature-text h2 { font-size: 1.75rem; }
        }
        </style>
---

```{=html}
<!-- Hero -->
<div class="apple-hero">
  <div class="container">
    <h1>Digital Infrastructure</h1>
    <p>Open-Source, UNIX &amp; Apple platforms tailored for SMBs across every industry</p>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- Services Grid -->
<div class="apple-section-alt">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="row">
      <div class="col-md-4 col-sm-6">
        <div class="apple-grid-item">
          <i class="bi bi-code-square"></i>
          <h3>Open-Source Stack</h3>
          <p>Production-ready open-source tools that replace expensive proprietary software. Self-hosted, no vendor lock-in.</p>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="col-md-4 col-sm-6">
        <div class="apple-grid-item">
          <i class="bi bi-terminal"></i>
          <h3>UNIX Systems</h3>
          <p>Enterprise-grade BSD and Linux infrastructure for servers, firewalls, storage, and networking.</p>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="col-md-4 col-sm-6">
        <div class="apple-grid-item">
          <i class="bi bi-apple"></i>
          <h3>Apple Infrastructure</h3>
          <p>Complete Apple ecosystem management with the new Apple Business platform and macOS fleet deployment.</p>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- Feature 1: Open-Source Stack -->
<div class="apple-section">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="apple-feature-row">
      <div class="apple-feature-img">
        <img src="/assets/images/stock/code-screen.jpg" alt="Open-source software development environment">
      </div>
      <div class="apple-feature-text">
        <h2>Open-Source Stack for Business</h2>
        <p>Replace expensive proprietary licenses with battle-tested open-source alternatives. We handle deployment, configuration, security hardening, and ongoing maintenance so your team can focus on their work.</p>
        <ul>
          <li><strong>Productivity &amp; Collaboration</strong> &mdash; LibreOffice, Nextcloud, Collabora Online, CryptPad, OnlyOffice</li>
          <li><strong>Communication</strong> &mdash; Matrix/Element, Mattermost, Jitsi Meet, Rocket.Chat</li>
          <li><strong>Identity &amp; Access</strong> &mdash; Keycloak, OpenLDAP, FreeIPA, Authelia</li>
          <li><strong>Monitoring &amp; Observability</strong> &mdash; Prometheus, Grafana, Uptime Kuma, Zabbix, Loki</li>
          <li><strong>DevOps &amp; Version Control</strong> &mdash; Gitea/Forgejo, Woodpecker CI, Docker, Podman</li>
          <li><strong>Databases &amp; Storage</strong> &mdash; PostgreSQL, MariaDB, Redis, MinIO, Restic</li>
        </ul>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- Feature 2: UNIX Infrastructure -->
<div class="apple-section-alt">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="apple-feature-row reverse">
      <div class="apple-feature-img">
        <img src="/assets/images/stock/server-racks.jpg" alt="UNIX server infrastructure rack">
      </div>
      <div class="apple-feature-text">
        <h2>UNIX Infrastructure</h2>
        <p>We build and manage servers, firewalls, and network appliances on proven UNIX operating systems. Whether you need a hardened OpenBSD firewall, a NixOS declarative fleet, or a traditional Linux server stack, we deliver infrastructure that is secure, reproducible, and maintainable.</p>
        <ul>
          <li><strong>NixOS</strong> &mdash; Declarative, reproducible, atomic upgrades and rollbacks</li>
          <li><strong>Debian/Ubuntu</strong> &mdash; LTS releases, massive package ecosystem, proven at any scale</li>
          <li><strong>RHEL/AlmaLinux</strong> &mdash; 10-year lifecycle, SELinux, FIPS certified</li>
          <li><strong>OpenBSD</strong> &mdash; Secure by default, pf firewall, built-in VPN</li>
          <li><strong>FreeBSD</strong> &mdash; ZFS enterprise filesystem, Jails, bhyve hypervisor</li>
          <li><strong>NetBSD</strong> &mdash; 60+ hardware platforms, ideal for embedded and IoT</li>
        </ul>
        <p>Hybrid environment integration included: Samba/AD directory bridging, cross-platform SSO, unified file sharing via NFS/SMB/WebDAV, and CUPS-based print management.</p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- Feature 3: Apple Business -->
<div class="apple-section">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="apple-feature-row">
      <div class="apple-feature-img">
        <img src="/assets/images/stock/team-macbooks.jpg" alt="Apple Business infrastructure with MacBooks">
      </div>
      <div class="apple-feature-text">
        <h2>Apple Business</h2>
        <p>We are early adopters and deployment partners for the new Apple Business platform, launching April 14, 2026. Apple Business replaces Apple Business Manager, Apple Business Essentials, and Apple Business Connect into a single, unified platform.</p>
        <ul>
          <li><strong>Built-in MDM</strong> &mdash; Full device management, no third-party license required</li>
          <li><strong>Blueprints</strong> &mdash; Zero-touch deployment, employees unbox and start working</li>
          <li><strong>Business Email &amp; Calendar</strong> &mdash; Custom domain email, shared calendars, company directory</li>
          <li><strong>Brand Management</strong> &mdash; Apple Maps, Wallet, Mail brand profiles and location insights</li>
          <li><strong>AppleCare+ for Business</strong> &mdash; Expert support and hardware repair coverage</li>
        </ul>
        <div class="apple-callout">
          <h4><i class="bi bi-apple me-2"></i>Free Platform</h4>
          <p>The Apple Business base platform is <strong>free</strong> &mdash; MDM, Blueprints, Managed Accounts, Brand Management, App Distribution, and Admin API included at no cost. Available April 14, 2026 in 200+ countries and regions.</p>
        </div>
        <br>
        <a class="apple-link" href="https://business.apple.com/preview" target="_blank">Apple Business Preview</a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- SMB Packages -->
<div class="apple-section-alt">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="apple-section-header">
      <h2>SMB Packages</h2>
      <p>Tailored packages combining Open-Source, UNIX, and Apple infrastructure to match your business size and needs.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="row">
      <div class="col-md-4 mb-4">
        <div class="apple-package-card">
          <h3>Starter</h3>
          <div class="subtitle">1 &ndash; 10 employees</div>
          <div class="tagline">For small teams getting started</div>
          <ul>
            <li>Apple Business setup &amp; Blueprints</li>
            <li>1 Linux server (Debian/Ubuntu)</li>
            <li>Nextcloud (files, contacts, calendar)</li>
            <li>Business email on custom domain</li>
            <li>Basic firewall (OpenBSD pf or UFW)</li>
            <li>Automated backups (Restic)</li>
            <li>Uptime monitoring</li>
          </ul>
          <a class="apple-btn-outline" href="https://cal.com/chenist" target="_blank">Book Consultation</a>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="col-md-4 mb-4">
        <div class="apple-package-card featured">
          <h3>Growth</h3>
          <div class="subtitle">11 &ndash; 50 employees</div>
          <div class="tagline">For scaling businesses</div>
          <ul>
            <li>Everything in Starter, plus:</li>
            <li>Full Apple MDM with team grouping</li>
            <li>OpenBSD dedicated firewall/VPN</li>
            <li>Keycloak SSO across all systems</li>
            <li>Matrix/Element team messaging</li>
            <li>Collabora Online (document editing)</li>
            <li>Prometheus + Grafana monitoring</li>
            <li>Samba/AD bridging (if needed)</li>
          </ul>
          <a class="apple-btn" href="https://cal.com/chenist" target="_blank">Book Consultation</a>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="col-md-4 mb-4">
        <div class="apple-package-card">
          <h3>Enterprise</h3>
          <div class="subtitle">50+ employees</div>
          <div class="tagline">For complex multi-site operations</div>
          <ul>
            <li>Everything in Growth, plus:</li>
            <li>Apple Business Admin API integration</li>
            <li>NixOS declarative multi-server fleet</li>
            <li>FreeBSD ZFS storage cluster</li>
            <li>High-availability configurations</li>
            <li>Multi-site VPN mesh</li>
            <li>Compliance baselines (NIS2, GDPR)</li>
            <li>24/7 monitoring &amp; incident response</li>
          </ul>
          <a class="apple-btn-outline" href="https://cal.com/chenist" target="_blank">Book Consultation</a>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- Industries Grid -->
<div class="apple-section">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="apple-section-header">
      <h2>Industries We Serve</h2>
      <p>Our digital infrastructure solutions are designed for any activity domain.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="row">
      <div class="col-md-3 col-6">
        <div class="apple-grid-item">
          <i class="bi bi-building"></i>
          <h3>Legal &amp; Consulting</h3>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="col-md-3 col-6">
        <div class="apple-grid-item">
          <i class="bi bi-heart-pulse"></i>
          <h3>Healthcare &amp; Clinics</h3>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="col-md-3 col-6">
        <div class="apple-grid-item">
          <i class="bi bi-gear"></i>
          <h3>Manufacturing</h3>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="col-md-3 col-6">
        <div class="apple-grid-item">
          <i class="bi bi-shop"></i>
          <h3>Retail &amp; Hospitality</h3>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="col-md-3 col-6">
        <div class="apple-grid-item">
          <i class="bi bi-truck"></i>
          <h3>Logistics &amp; Transport</h3>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="col-md-3 col-6">
        <div class="apple-grid-item">
          <i class="bi bi-palette"></i>
          <h3>Creative &amp; Media</h3>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="col-md-3 col-6">
        <div class="apple-grid-item">
          <i class="bi bi-mortarboard"></i>
          <h3>Education</h3>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="col-md-3 col-6">
        <div class="apple-grid-item">
          <i class="bi bi-bank"></i>
          <h3>Finance &amp; Insurance</h3>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- Registration / Booking Form -->
<div class="apple-section-alt">
  <div class="container" style="max-width: 800px;">
    <div class="apple-section-header">
      <h2>Request a Consultation</h2>
      <p>Register your interest or book a call with our team.</p>
    </div>
    <div style="background: white; border-radius: 16px; padding: 2.5rem; box-shadow: 0 2px 12px rgba(0,0,0,0.06);">
      <ul class="nav nav-tabs" id="regTabs-digital" role="tablist">
        <li class="nav-item" role="presentation">
          <button class="nav-link active" data-bs-toggle="tab" data-bs-target="#formReg-digital" type="button" role="tab">
            <i class="bi bi-file-earmark-text me-2"></i>Register (Romania)
          </button>
        </li>
        <li class="nav-item" role="presentation">
          <button class="nav-link" data-bs-toggle="tab" data-bs-target="#calReg-digital" type="button" role="tab">
            <i class="bi bi-calendar-check me-2"></i>Book a Call (EU / International)
          </button>
        </li>
      </ul>
      <div class="tab-content pt-3">
        <div class="tab-pane fade show active" id="formReg-digital" role="tabpanel">
          <p class="text-muted"><i class="bi bi-geo-alt me-1"></i>Fill out the form and we'll get back to you within 24 hours.</p>
          <form action="https://formspree.io/f/mpwkaqev" method="POST">
            <div class="row">
              <div class="col-md-6 mb-3">
                <label class="form-label">Full Name *</label>
                <input type="text" class="form-control" name="name" required placeholder="Your full name">
              </div>
              <div class="col-md-6 mb-3">
                <label class="form-label">Email *</label>
                <input type="email" class="form-control" name="email" required placeholder="your@email.com">
              </div>
            </div>
            <div class="row">
              <div class="col-md-6 mb-3">
                <label class="form-label">Phone</label>
                <input type="tel" class="form-control" name="phone" placeholder="Phone number">
              </div>
              <div class="col-md-6 mb-3">
                <label class="form-label">Company</label>
                <input type="text" class="form-control" name="company" placeholder="Company">
              </div>
            </div>
            <div class="mb-3">
              <label class="form-label">Package Interest</label>
              <select class="form-select" name="interest">
                <option value="">Select a package...</option>
                <option value="starter">Starter (1-10 employees)</option>
                <option value="growth">Growth (11-50 employees)</option>
                <option value="enterprise">Enterprise (50+ employees)</option>
                <option value="custom">Custom / Not sure yet</option>
              </select>
            </div>
            <div class="mb-3">
              <label class="form-label">Tell us about your infrastructure needs</label>
              <textarea class="form-control" name="message" rows="3" placeholder="Current setup, number of devices, specific needs (Linux, BSD, Apple, open-source tools)..."></textarea>
            </div>
            <input type="hidden" name="_subject" value="Digital Infrastructure Inquiry from chen.ist">
            <input type="hidden" name="_source" value="digital-infrastructure">
            <input type="text" name="_gotcha" style="display:none">
            <div class="mb-3 form-check">
              <input type="checkbox" class="form-check-input" required>
              <label class="form-check-label">I agree to the <a href="/privacy.html" target="_blank">privacy policy</a> *</label>
            </div>
            <button type="submit" class="apple-btn" style="width: 100%; border: none; cursor: pointer; padding: 1rem; font-size: 1.05rem;"><i class="bi bi-send me-2"></i>Request Consultation</button>
          </form>
        </div>
        <div class="tab-pane fade" id="calReg-digital" role="tabpanel">
          <p class="text-muted"><i class="bi bi-globe me-1"></i>Prefer a live conversation? Book directly in our calendar.</p>
          <a href="https://cal.com/chenist" target="_blank" class="apple-btn-outline" style="display: block; text-align: center; padding: 1rem; font-size: 1.05rem;"><i class="bi bi-calendar-check me-2"></i>Book via Cal.com</a>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- CTA -->
<div class="apple-section">
  <div class="apple-cta">
    <div class="container">
      <h2>Ready to build your digital infrastructure?</h2>
      <p>Book a free consultation to discuss your business needs and get a tailored infrastructure proposal.</p>
      <a class="apple-btn" href="https://cal.com/chenist" target="_blank" style="margin-right: 1rem;">Book a Consultation</a>
      <a class="apple-btn-outline" href="mailto:digital@chen.ist">Email digital@chen.ist</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```
